title: upgrade locks
text: upgrade locks Upgrade locking for existing tables to data pages, all pages, or row-level locking. USYS$SYB_PARAMS = upgrade dpl | apl | locks Arguments dpl —upgrade to data pages locking apl —upgrade to all pages locking locks —upgrade to row-level locking Description When this options is enabled, the Create Table facility creates SQL scripts to upgrade existing tables to the specified locking level. The Create Table facility modifies existing tables rather than creating new tables, so you must stop and restart the Sybase SQL server after running the SQL script in order for the server to recognize the change. Use of the these option requires Sybase SQL Server 11.9.2 or higher. Related Links Upgrade to Row-Level, Data Pages, and All Pages Locking Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
